_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: We used the EGFP marker to isolate KRAS KO cells with similar EGFP–K-Ras levels
details: Used to detect EGFP-tagged K-Ras proteins and isolate cells with similar EGFP–K-Ras levels
